endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/loggers
endpoints.description: Lists a collection of loggers in the specified service instance.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.description: Gets the details of the logger specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: HEAD /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ApiManagement/service/{serviceName}/loggers/{loggerid}
endpoints.description: Gets the entity state (Etag) version of the logger specified by its identifier.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOGGERID}} with a real loggerid. Replace {{SERVICENAME}} with a real servicename. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
